/**-------gallery--------**/

.custom-gallery-wrapper{
    max-width: 1400px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0;
    box-shadow: 0px 10px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) !important;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 25px;
}


/* Main image container */
.custom-gallery-main{
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1400px;
    height: 600px;
    max-height: 600px;
    background: #FCFCFC;
    border-radius: 25px;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;

    /* مهم برای اینکه همه عکس‌ها در DOM بمانند ولی فقط یکی دیده شود */
    position: relative;
}


/* Main displayed images (SEO-safe) */
.custom-gallery-main img.main-img {
    width: auto;
    height: 550px;
    object-fit: contain;
    box-shadow:
        -10px -10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05),
         10px -10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05),
          0   -10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    object-position: center center;
    border-radius: 25px;

    /* به جای display:none */
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    margin: auto;

    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;

    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
}

.custom-gallery-main img.main-img.active {
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: auto;
}


/* Green strip container */
.thumbs-nav {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1400px;
    background: #FCFCFC;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 20px;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 20px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    position: relative;
}


/* Scroll buttons */
.thumb-scroll-btn {
    display: inline-flex !important;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 50px !important;
    height: 50px !important;
    min-width: 50px !important;
    min-height: 50px !important;
    max-width: 50px !important;
    max-height: 50px !important;
    border-radius: 50% !important;
    background-color: #fff;
    color: #004d25;
    border: none;
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: bold;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    flex: none !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
}

.thumb-scroll-btn:hover {
    background-color: #004d25;
    color: #fff;
    transform: scale(1.1);
}


/* Thumbnails row */
.thumbs-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    flex: 1;
    padding: 10px 0;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Each thumbnail */
.thumbs-wrapper .thumb {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    border-radius: 10px;
    object-fit: cover;
    opacity: 0.8;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: 0.3s;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.thumbs-wrapper .thumb:hover {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.thumbs-wrapper .thumb.active {
    border: 3px solid #fff;
    opacity: 1;
}



.custom-gallery-noscript img{
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    margin: 10px 0;
}


/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    .custom-gallery-main {
        width: 100%;
        height: 320px;
    }

    .custom-gallery-main img.main-img {
        width: 100% !important;
        height: auto !important;
        object-fit: cover !important;
        object-position: center !important;
        border-radius: 25px !important;
        max-height: 320px;
    }

    .thumbs-nav {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 0 10px;
    }

    .thumb-scroll-btn {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        font-size: 20px;
    }

    .thumbs-wrapper {
        gap: 8px;
    }

    .thumbs-wrapper .thumb {
        width: 80px;
        height: 80px;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 10px -6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
}
